logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
removed_or_excluded_refs: Add [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] to the artifacts directory (if not already present) and ensure it is committed so previews include it.

Advanced task: Flood risk raster threshold analysis. Geospatial packet: cell A elevation=4m slope=2% flood_depth=0.3m distance_road=120m; cell B elevation=1m slope=6% flood_depth=1.2m road=80m; cell C elevation=8m slope=12% flood_depth=0 road=240m. Rules: exclude flood_depth>1m or slope>10%; score lower road distance better. Produce the stated deliverable with calculations, assumptions, exceptions, and exact row/value citations. Do not invent additional records; mark missing inputs as needs_revi

Include the [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] file in the deliverables preview so verifiers can inspect its content.

The grader correctly documents reliance on memo.md and notes the missing GeoJSON preview. To fully verify the grader's semantic judgments and per-feature numeric fields, a preview or content hash for [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] must be provided.

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]','[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]']; const out=files.map(f=>{const b=fs.readFileSync(f); const crypto=require('crypto'); return {path:f, bytes:b.length, sha256:crypto.createHash('sha256').update(b).digest('hex')};}); console.log(JSON.stringify(out,null,2));"
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const g=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]','utf8')); const ids=g.features.map(f=>f.properties.cell_id).join(','); console.log('ids', ids);"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const g=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]','utf8')); if(g.type!=='FeatureCollection'||g.features.length!==3) throw new Error('geojson structure mismatch'); console.log('geojson_ok', g.features.length);"

node -e "for (const f of ['agent_trace.json','actual_outputs.json','[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]']) { JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f, 'utf8')); console.log('OK', f); }" && sed -n '1,240p' [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]
